---
title: "SCANDARE-ORL: ITH results analysis"
author: "Abderaouf Hamza"
format: html
---

<!--
================================================================================
 Script  : ITH_DNA_analysis.qmd
 Project : SCANDARE-ORL (HNSCC intra-tumour heterogeneity study)
 Purpose : Aggregate the per-sample subclonal-structure outputs of the four
           clonal-deconvolution tools plus the WeMe consensus, compute a
           Shannon-index ITH score per sample and per tool, and compare
           scores and inferred number of clones across tools.
 Inputs  : - Sample list TSV (one row per region).
           - Per-tool result directories under `ith_results_path`
             (see 03_0_preprocess_results_for_WeMe.R for layout).
           - WeMe consensus output sub-directory under the same root.
 Outputs : - TSV with one row per region containing the Shannon ITH score
             and inferred number of clones for each tool + the consensus.
 Method  : For each tool, the ITH score is the Shannon entropy
                H = -sum(p_i * log(p_i))
           where p_i is the CCF of cluster i (interpreted as a proportion).
           NOTE: this is not strictly a Shannon diversity in the ecological
           sense (the CCFs do not sum to 1) — it is used here as a relative
           score for cross-tool comparison, consistent with the manuscript.
================================================================================
-->

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(corrplot)
```

# Configuration

```{r config}
# --- CONFIG -------------------------------------------------------------------
SCANDARE_sample_list_path <- "<path/to/SCANDARE_CONIPHER_samples.tsv>"
ith_results_path          <- "<path/to/results/ith_dna/>"
output_tsv_path           <- "<path/to/results/ith_dna/SCANDAREORL_ith_scores.tsv>"
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```

# Data

```{r import-data}
SCANDARE_sample_list.tsv <- read_tsv(SCANDARE_sample_list_path)

# CONIPHER requires patient IDs to share a common string prefix (SCDR)
# followed by a number.
SCANDARE_sample_list <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list.tsv %>%
  separate_rows(Barcode_DRAGON, sep = "/") %>%
  mutate(
    id_run_DRAGON = str_extract(Barcode_DRAGON, "D[:digit:]{3}"),
    CASE_ID       = str_c("SCDR", str_remove(ID_SCANDARE, "-"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(CASE_ID) %>%
  mutate(SAMPLE = str_c(CASE_ID, "_", row_number())) %>%
  ungroup()


## CloneSig
Clonesig_results <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list %>%
  select("sample" = Barcode_DRAGON) %>%
  mutate(clonesig_results = map(sample, \(x) tryCatch(
    error = function(e) NA,
    read_tsv(
      str_c(ith_results_path, "clonesig/", x, "_clonesig_out.tsv"),
      col_select = c("clone", "clone_ccf")
    ) %>%
      group_by(clone) %>%
      mutate(n_ssms = n(), clone = clone + 1) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      rename("cluster" = clone, "proportion" = clone_ccf)
  )))

## DPClust
DPClust_results <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list %>%
  select("sample" = Barcode_DRAGON) %>%
  mutate(dpclust_results = map(sample, \(x) tryCatch(
    error = function(e) NA,
    read_tsv(
      str_c(
        ith_results_path, "dpclust/", "/", x, "/",
        x, "_DPoutput_2000iters_1000burnin_seed123/",
        x, "_2000iters_1000burnin_bestClusterInfo.txt"
      )
    ) %>%
      rename(
        "cluster"    = cluster.no,
        "proportion" = location,
        "n_ssms"     = no.of.mutations
      ) %>%
      mutate(proportion = ifelse(proportion > 1, 1, proportion)) %>%
      group_by(proportion) %>%
      summarise(n_ssms = sum(n_ssms, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      arrange(desc(proportion)) %>%
      mutate(cluster = row_number()) %>%
      select(cluster, n_ssms, proportion)
  )))

## PhylogicNDT
PhylogicNTD_results <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list %>%
  select("sample" = Barcode_DRAGON) %>%
  mutate(phylogicndt_results = map(sample, \(x) tryCatch(
    error = function(e) NA,
    read_tsv(
      str_c(ith_results_path, "phylogicndt/", "/", x, "/",
            x, ".mut_ccfs.txt"),
      col_select = c("Cluster_Assignment", "clust_ccf_mean")
    ) %>%
      group_by(Cluster_Assignment) %>%
      mutate(n_ssms = n()) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      rename("cluster"    = Cluster_Assignment,
             "proportion" = clust_ccf_mean)
  )))

## PyClone-VI
Pyclonebeta_results <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list %>%
  select("sample" = Barcode_DRAGON) %>%
  mutate(pyclone_results = map(sample, \(x) tryCatch(
    error = function(e) NA,
    read_tsv(
      str_c(ith_results_path, "pyclone_vi/", x,
            "_pyclonevi.tsv_output.tsv"),
      col_select = c("cluster_id", "cellular_prevalence")
    ) %>%
      group_by(cluster_id) %>%
      mutate(n_ssms = n()) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      rename("cluster"    = cluster_id,
             "proportion" = cellular_prevalence) %>%
      mutate(cluster = cluster + 1)
  )))

## WeMe consensus
WeMe_results <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list %>%
  select("sample" = Barcode_DRAGON) %>%
  mutate(weme_results = map(sample, \(x) tryCatch(
    error = function(e) NA,
    read_tsv(
      str_c(ith_results_path, "weme/", x, "/",
            x, "_subclonal_structure.txt"),
      col_select = c("cluster", "proportion")
    ) %>%
      group_by(cluster) %>%
      mutate(n_ssms = n()) %>%
      distinct()
  )))
```

# Compute Shannon ITH score per tool

```{r ith-scores}
clonesig_ith <-
  Clonesig_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(clonesig_results)) %>%
  unnest(clonesig_results) %>%
  select(sample, cluster, proportion) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    clonesig_ith_score = -sum(proportion * log(proportion)),
    clonesig_n_clones  = n()
  )

pyclone_ith <-
  Pyclonebeta_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(pyclone_results)) %>%
  unnest(pyclone_results) %>%
  select(sample, cluster, proportion) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    pyclone_ith_score = -sum(proportion * log(proportion)),
    pyclone_n_clones  = n()
  )

dpclust_ith <-
  DPClust_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(dpclust_results)) %>%
  unnest(dpclust_results) %>%
  select(sample, cluster, proportion) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    dpclust_ith_score = -sum(proportion * log(proportion)),
    dpclust_n_clones  = n()
  )

phylogicndt_ith <-
  PhylogicNTD_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(phylogicndt_results)) %>%
  unnest(phylogicndt_results) %>%
  select(sample, cluster, proportion) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    phylogicndt_ith_score = -sum(proportion * log(proportion)),
    phylogicndt_n_clones  = n()
  )

weme_ith <-
  WeMe_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(weme_results)) %>%
  unnest(weme_results) %>%
  select(sample, cluster, proportion) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    weme_ith_score = -sum(proportion * log(proportion)),
    weme_n_clones  = n()
  )

ith_scores <-
  SCANDARE_sample_list %>%
  rename("sample" = Barcode_DRAGON) %>%
  left_join(clonesig_ith) %>%
  left_join(pyclone_ith) %>%
  left_join(dpclust_ith) %>%
  left_join(phylogicndt_ith) %>%
  left_join(weme_ith) %>%
  select(-c(id_run_DRAGON, CASE_ID, SAMPLE))
```

# Diagnostic plots

```{r plots}
ith_scores_distribution_histogram <-
  ith_scores %>%
  pivot_longer(matches("ith"),
               names_to  = "method",
               values_to = "ith_score") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ith_score)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~method) +
  theme_bw()
ith_scores_distribution_histogram

ith_scores_distribution_correlation <-
  ggscatter(
    ith_scores,
    x        = "clonesig_ith_score",
    y        = "pyclone_ith_score",
    add      = "reg.line",
    conf.int = TRUE,
    add.params = list(color = "blue", fill = "lightgray")
  ) +
  stat_cor(method = "pearson")
ith_scores_distribution_correlation

n_clones_comparison <-
  ith_scores %>%
  group_by(clonesig_n_clones, pyclone_n_clones) %>%
  tally() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = clonesig_n_clones, y = pyclone_n_clones, size = n)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw()
n_clones_comparison

ith_scores %>%
  select(matches("ith_score")) %>%
  cor(use = "complete.obs") %>%
  corrplot()

ith_scores %>%
  select(matches("n_clones")) %>%
  cor(use = "complete.obs") %>%
  corrplot()
```

# Write output

```{r write-output}
ith_scores %>%
  filter(!is.na(clonesig_ith_score)) %>%
  rename("Barcode_DRAGON" = sample) %>%
  write_tsv(output_tsv_path)
```
